introSection: Hiccup's Wing Gliders is a steel launched roller coaster built by Swiss company Intamin currently located at Universal Epic Universe in Orlando, Florida, USA. It is located in the How to Train Your Dragon: Isle of Berk themed area.
fullText: Hiccup's Wing Gliders is a steel launched roller coaster built by Swiss company Intamin currently located at Universal Epic Universe in Orlando, Florida, USA. It is located in the How to Train Your Dragon: Isle of Berk themed area.
